name: get_material_nodes
description: Get the blueprint node graph (expression nodes) of a UE Material. Traverses from material property inputs via BFS with safety limits. Returns node class, position, connections, and key properties.
author: xiaoyou

tools.name: get_material_nodes
tools.description: Get all expression nodes of a Material asset. Provide material_path. Optional: max_depth (default 20), max_nodes (default 200).
